What's Included

  • Gunite/shotcrete pool shell with #4 rebar on 8" centers
  • 32'×16' rectangle pool, 3' shallow / 5' deep
  • 10" floors and 12" walls with tanning shelf (per plans)
  • 1.5" PVC returns and 2" suction lines
  • Waterline tile and coping
  • Crystal Stone pebble interior finish (any color)
  • Umbrella insert in the middle of the tanning ledge
  • Pentair equipment with heat/cool pump
  • Cartridge filter and variable-speed pump
  • Equipment hookup and bonding to code
  • Deck-O-Seal mastic around the pool
  • Start up, pool school, and chemical balance
  • 3D design and construction plans
  • Full clean up — trash and debris removed
  • 1-year workmanship warranty
  • 3-year Pentair equipment warranty
Handled By Others / Included at No Charge
PermitN/A
Gas LinesN/A
Umbrella InsertIncluded

Scope of Work

Pool Construction

Gunite/shotcrete shell with full #4 rebar cage on 8" centers. Dimensions: 32'×16' rectangle, 96' perimeter. Depth 3' shallow to 5' deep. 10" floors and 12" walls with a tanning shelf per plans.

Interior & Finish

Interior finish: Crystal Stone pebble plaster (any color). Waterline tile and coping installed around the pool perimeter.

Equipment & Systems

Pentair equipment package for the pool with heat/cool pump. Variable-speed pump, cartridge filter, and full equipment hookup. Start up program, plaster cure, and chemical balance included.

Excavation & Site Work

Small excavator with Bobcat shuttle and haul off. Deck-O-Seal mastic around the pool. Clean up of all trash and debris. Sprinkler reroute (cap, reroute, and re-zone) handled as needed.

Plumbing & Electrical

1.5" PVC returns and 2" suction. Electrical equipment hookup and bonding to code.

Financing Available

1Third-Party Financing
Apply for financing through one of our third-party lending partners. Rates typically fall between 4% and 9% APR depending on credit profile, with repayment terms of 6 months or more. Subject to lender approval. Ask Brent about getting pre-qualified — it only takes a few minutes and won't affect your credit.

Payment Milestones

Payments are tied to construction progress, so you only pay as each phase is completed.

1
Material Deposit10%   $8,672.50
Secures your spot on the build calendar and begins ordering materials.
2
Gunite Complete20%   $17,345.00
Due once the pool shell is shot and cured.
3
Tile & Coping Complete25%   $21,681.25
Due when waterline tile and coping are installed.
4
Plaster Complete25%   $21,681.25
Due once the interior pebble finish is applied.
5
Final Completion20%   $17,345.00
Remaining balance due on startup, pool school, and final walkthrough.
